title: verilator confuses parameter and pin in the error message

features.name: named parameter override in module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with named parameter override using dot notation
features.snippet:
module xba #(parameter integer C_M_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH = 32) (); endmodule
xba #(.C_M_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH(16)) u_xba();
